objective: Observe the remaining fixed-width homogeneous sample formats through finite pinned-official protocol-110 IPv4-loopback cases in both directions where the independently authored harness safely supports them, publishing only sanitized shape/width/order outcomes and provenance hashes.
outputs: A bounded black-box format-family matrix for double64, int32, int16, int8, and int64 using documented public APIs only.
Exact sanitized success or first-failure stages per direction and format, with raw bytes, documents, endpoints, diagnostics, binaries, environments, and caches private.
One evidence-backed recommendation for the next vertical runtime-format correction or implementation unit.

acceptance.proof: Every selected format/direction terminates under explicit discovery, connection, and sample deadlines with a sanitized exact outcome.
Only public APIs and independently authored drivers are used; all private artifacts remain outside the repository and are bound by hashes.
No production implementation, string/chunk behavior, multicast, device, unsafe/FFI, or Manifold authority is added.

commit_policy: Commit only sanitized bounded observation evidence and intentional lifecycle/push changes; preserve every failed attempt.
non_scope: Official implementation source, copied or translated source, production runtime changes, string samples, chunks, smoothing, recovery changes, multicast/interface selection, non-loopback, or broad compatibility.
Devices, dependencies, unsafe, FFI, private raw publication, or Manifold authority.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route the bounded format-family observation and exclusions.
